payload.answer: I have Sara recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a different Sara, or whether the earlier relationship should be corrected.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara, matching an existing person named Sara, but the relationship 'niece' conflicts with the existing relationship 'daughter'. No durable update should be made without clarification.

details: Detected a conflict between existing and new relationship statements.

repair_options: Confirm this is a different person named Sara who is your niece.
Replace the existing memory so Sara is your niece instead of your daughter.
Keep the existing memory that Sara is your daughter and ignore the new statement.
Clarify that Sara is both your daughter and niece only if that is intentionally true in your family context.
